title: How to get a police certificate – Chile - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Chile
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Names of the documents you need
- Certificado Antecedentes Fines Especiales (for criminal convictions)
- Hoja de Vida del Conductor (for driving convictions related to driving)

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you live in Chile
- in person at any office of the Registro Civil e Identification
- online at Servicio de Registro Civil e Identificacion (available in Spanish only)
If you live in Chile and can’t apply on your own, you may provide notarized authorization for someone else to apply for you.

### If you live outside Chile
- at your nearest Chilean embassy or consulate or
- online at Servicio de Registro Civil e Identificación (available in Spanish only)
You’ll need to request
- a Certificado de Antecedentes para Fines Especiales and
- an original Hoja de vida del Conductor

## Information you need
- Rol Único Tributario ([ RUT ] taxation unique contributor roll identification number)
- Rol Único Nacional ([ RUN ] National Identification Number)
